title: hyssopus officinalis f. albus
intro: Hyssopus officinalis f. albus, also known as white hyssop, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of white hyssop include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and ease digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oils.
